# docs(agentos): author the core agent-skills guide — lane-driving + collaboration skills (benefits + bigger-picture fit)

Part of #14310 · content rubric + §Mandatory V-B-A grounding in #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** ~40 Progressive Disclosure skills exist; `ProgressiveDisclosureSkills.md` covers the **mechanism**, but there's **no guide on the benefits of the CORE ones** (driving lanes + collaboration) or how they fit the bigger Neo picture.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] New guide spotlighting the core lane-driving + collaboration skills (e.g. `lead-role`, `peer-role`, `pr-review`, `ticket-create`, `epic-create`, `post-review-pickup`, `session-sunset`, `context-recovery`) — what each unlocks + how they compose into the engineering lifecycle.
- [ ] How the skill system fits the bigger picture (the institution's repeatable protocols); why-care.
- [ ] Complements (does not duplicate) `ProgressiveDisclosureSkills.md` (mechanism).
- [ ] Registered in `tree.json`.

**⚠️ V-B-A grounding (mandatory before writing):** `.agents/skills/` (the actual skill set + the core ones' `SKILL.md` triggers/descriptions), `ProgressiveDisclosureSkills.md` (the mechanism it complements), the v13 release-notes skills framing (30 → ~40). Write from VERIFIED reality; capture grounding evidence in the PR.

**Files:** new `learn/agentos/CoreSkills.md` (name TBD) + `learn/tree.json`.
